form.formComment: Placed at both starts this track and trip. Latest effort finished 7th over 460m at Geelong beaten 17 lengths (27.28) behind Little Flower in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on March 24. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Showed brilliant pace early and gave a sight when a 4.5 lengths third over 350m Healesville in 19.63. Has a solid record from this draw including three wins. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (24.69) over 425m at Bendigo. Squeeze draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished last on March 10 over 410m at this track behind Paw Quebec beaten 14 lengths (23.95) in a Grade 4/5. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 5.5 lengths over 425m at Bendigo in a handy (24.32), beating Zero Monster. Expected to run well again.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.67) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 4 lengths. Has two wins and seven placings from 17 starts from the draw. Leading chance.
